subject: Can't log into Workday
body: Hi IT, I've been trying to log into Workday all morning and keep getting 'Invalid credentials.' I changed my password last week and everything was working fine until today. I need to approve timesheets before end of day. Can someone help ASAP?

subject: URGENT - EHR system down in ER
body: The Epic system is not loading on any of the 6 workstations in ER Bay 3. We have patients waiting and cannot access medical records. This is a patient safety issue. Need immediate response.

subject: Need Adobe Acrobat installed
body: Hey, I need Adobe Acrobat Pro installed on my laptop. I'm in the contracts team and need to edit and sign PDFs. My asset tag is MHS-L-4892. I'm in Building C, 3rd floor. Any day this week works.

subject: Suspicious email received
body: I received an email that looks like it's from our CEO asking me to purchase gift cards urgently. The email address looks slightly different from the real one. I didn't click anything but wanted to report it. I've attached a screenshot.

subject: VPN disconnecting every 10 minutes
body: I'm working remotely today and the VPN keeps dropping every 10-15 minutes. I have to reconnect each time and it's killing my productivity. I'm on Comcast with 200mbps. Using the Cisco AnyConnect client version 4.10. This started happening after the update last Friday.

subject: New employee needs accounts set up
body: We have a new hire starting Monday, March 18. Name: David Park, Department: Radiology, Title: Radiology Technician. He'll need: AD account, email, Epic access (read-only initially), badge access to Building A and Radiology wing, and a laptop from standard inventory. Manager: Dr. Sarah Kim.

subject: Printer on 4th floor not working
body: The big printer/copier on the 4th floor of Building B (the HP LaserJet near the break room) has been showing 'Paper Jam' for two days. We've cleared the paper path multiple times but it keeps coming back. Asset tag: MHS-P-1247.

subject: Monthly IT cost report needed
body: Hi team, for the board meeting next Thursday I need the monthly IT cost breakdown by category (infrastructure, SaaS, personnel, projects). Also need YTD actuals vs budget and a forecast for Q2. Can you pull this together by Wednesday?

subject: Shared drive permissions issue
body: I was moved from the Finance team to the Strategy team last month but I still have access to the Finance shared drive (\\mhs-fs01\finance) and I can't access the Strategy drive (\\mhs-fs01\strategy). Can you fix the permissions? My employee ID is E-4521.

subject: Conference room AV not working for board presentation
body: The projector and Teams Room system in the main boardroom (Building A, Room 101) isn't connecting to laptops. We have a board meeting tomorrow at 9 AM and the CEO is presenting. This needs to work. Last time it took 20 minutes to get it going and the board was not happy.
